center.name: 达尔文 (澳大利亚)
center.summary: 达尔文 (澳大利亚)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Elegant imperial pigeon、北澳玫瑰鹦鹉，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Vagrants have also been recorded from Buru and Darwin, Australia. The elegant imperial pigeon inhabits primary forest, secondary forest, forest edge, and trees in cultivated areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The northern rosella is occasionally found in mangroves or public green spaces in suburban Darwin
